stage: Supabase-backed private Maxim portal with live availability and participant management
notes: The portal now authenticates through the Supabase maxim-portal Edge Function using a temporary shared access code exchanged for an eight-hour random session token. The access code is not present in the page or repository. Maxim employee records persist in Supabase behind RLS; edits and safe deactivation are live. The course/date selector continues to read the public schedule, and registration requests are revalidated against the live public schedule before Supabase persistence. Google Voice group chat remains a disabled shell.
